rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Its detailed note correctly identifies the visual ambiguity of the '6' character after the pence digit and accurately interprets the pounds/shillings split based on column alignment. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined pounds and shillings and misread the pence, claiming the reading was 'unambiguous' despite clear visual evidence to the contrary.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms that this row has no monetary amounts on its line, serving as a descriptive entry or sub-header for the following monetary entries. gpt-5-mini structurally misinterpreted the ledger, incorrectly assigning the monetary values from the subsequent line to this description, thus effectively 'missing' this specific row's structure.
rows.english_description: Debts due from the preceding year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Debts due from the preceding year, amount not stated.

rows.notes: This row was only correctly identified and extracted by gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms its presence in the image with the description '---' and the specified monetary amounts. gpt-5-mini completely missed this distinct monetary entry, having incorrectly assigned these amounts to the 'Debita Anni praecedentis' line.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts are consensus across both extractors and visually clear. Selected gemini-flash for the description '---' which more accurately reflects the short dashed line in the image. gpt-5-mini's note about 'looped strokes near the shillings digit' was not observed visually.
